name: Matar Makhani- Green Peas in Creamy Sauce - India
recipeIngredient: 1 fresh hot green chili, finely chopped
1/2 tsp black or yellow mustard seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine sugar, ground cumin, Garam Masala, salt, chili powder, and tomato puree. Add 2 tablespoons water and mix well.
2. Gradually add cream and stir. Stir in lemon juice, coriander leaves, and chopped green chili; mix and set aside.
3. Heat oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat. Once hot, add cumin seeds and mustard seeds.
4. As soon as the mustard seeds begin to pop, add the peas and sauté for 30 seconds.
5. Add the cream sauce and cook on high for 1-2 minutes or until thick, stirring gently.
